subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Praise be unto God that companionship, love and fellowship remain firm and steadfast, for our communion is at the Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیق دیرین الحمد لله رفاقت و محبت و الفت پا برجاست زیرا همدمی ما در عتبه
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God
